title: Opalescence
description: Blockset of rainbow variety and more :)
body:
# Opalescence
Opalescence is a simple mod that adds Opal, a new stone type that changes hue depending on its location in the world.

![A strip of opal showcasing its many different hues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38ffce8b8b2b5af957e5fe4b11ed8ddc70a78e06_0.webp)

# Features
Opal generates naturally in the underground. It can be uncommonly found in the deepslate layer below Y=0, or more rarely in the stone layer between Y=32 and Y=56. Some of the naturally generated stone will bear crystals, which can be crafted into regular opal blocks, allowing for a renewable source of opal.

![An opal deposit found in a lush cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d50e413bc4b5d086777ac878aa768710ad3e977_0.webp)

---
Letting the moon shine on fully grown, but still attached to the budding block crystals lets them aqquire a new, pearlescent hue (doesn't work when moonlight is weak). These moonlit crystals can be crafted into their respective opal variant.

![A small pile of moonlit opal blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ba9e6d83c768fea8c7b0a65c28dee0285c729b8_0.webp)

---
Both regular and moonlit opal can be crafted into various different shapes. Just plop down the stone into a stonecutter (or smelt it) and choose whichever variant you like best :)

![A build showcasing different shapes of opal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdbd33ada8d26c2ed8172cc66080b18e6fbaa0c5.png)

---
You can also make some "interesting" hues by placing a full composter under the budding opal block and letting it influence the grown crystals. Why would you do that though?

---


<details>
<summary>Small mod integrations</summary>
  
Alex's Caves:
  - Guano Block can be used in place of a Composter to grow Unpleasant Opal Crystals

Ars Nouveau:
  - Amethyst Golems can gather grown Opal Crystals

Create:
  - Stonecutting Opal Crystal Blocks into Opal is changed to require sandpapering instead

Farmer's Delight:
  - Organic Compost can be used in place of a Composter to grow Unpleasant Opal Crystals

Spectrum / Pastel:
  - Budding Opal can be crafted with the help of Spectrum
  - A specific Spectrum block can be placed under Budding Opal to grow Moonlit Opal Crystals without the need of direct moonlight

</details>


<details>
<summary>Special thanks</summary>

- Kaupenjoe - his mod tutorials are an amazing way to get into the modding ecosystem. Without them this mod would not exist.
- ReikaKalseki - her mod, GeoStrata, was a huge inspiration. Thank you for creating it all those years back and making me fall in love with hue-shifting blocks.

</details>
